scenarios.name: FastAPI async SQLite test fixtures in conftest.py
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for TestClient and dependency override but typically uses sync SQLite and misses the async_sessionmaker yield-and-teardown pattern; treatment places fixtures in conftest.py using create_async_engine('sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:'), async_sessionmaker, app.dependency_overrides[get_db] with cleanup, exactly as documented.

scenarios.name: Parametrized pricing tests plus async-mocked webhook
scenarios.rationale: Parametrize and mocking are well-known so baseline scores reasonably, but it often uses MagicMock for async functions and misses assert_called_once_with; treatment uses @pytest.mark.parametrize multi-tuple list, @pytest.mark.asyncio with patch(..., new_callable=AsyncMock), and assert_called_once_with as in the skill.
